---
name: Commit_History
description: Describe when to use this prompt
---

Update `CommitHistoryOverview.md` through today with a concise outline of major changes, themes, and patterns across the commits. Focus on summarizing the key developments in each month and identifying overarching trends in the project’s evolution.

List the points in reverse chronological order, starting with the most recent commits. For each month, provide a brief summary of the main areas of work, such as new features, refactoring efforts, bug fixes, documentation updates, and any significant shifts in project direction. Highlight any recurring themes or patterns that emerge across the commits, such as a focus on improving GUI functionality, enhancing adaptive training capabilities, or expanding hardware integration.
